text: The good news landed exactly as it should have—earned, deserved, and a little overdue. I've watched you want this for so long that hearing it finally happened feels like something settling into its rightful place. Congratulations, truly. You worked for this with a quiet persistence that not everyone saw, but I did, and I'm so glad the world caught up to what you've known about yourself all along. Go celebrate. Let yourself feel the size of it. And when the dust settles, tell me everything—I want to hear how it feels.
